BANDITS_TORTOISE.opener_hint: Customer came from a Bandits Tortoise ad. Acknowledge that specific model by name in your first reply, lead with the product (tortoise frame, polarized). Skip the generic sales template -- they already saw pricing on the ad.

BANDITS_GREEN.opener_hint: Customer came from a Bandits Green ad. Acknowledge the model by name (matte black frame, blue-green mirror lens), lead with the product. Skip the generic sales template.

BANDITS_GLOSSY_BLACK.opener_hint: Customer came from a Bandits Glossy Black ad. Acknowledge the model (glossy frame, dark polarized lens, clean everyday pair), lead with the product. Skip the generic sales template.

BANDITS_MATTE.opener_hint: Customer came from a Bandits Matte Black ad. Acknowledge the model (matte frame, polarized), lead with the product. Skip the generic sales template.

BANDITS_BLUE.opener_hint: Customer came from a Bandits Blue ad. Acknowledge the model (matte black frame, blue mirror lens), lead with the product. Skip the generic sales template.

OUTBACK_RED.opener_hint: Customer came from an Outback Red ad. Acknowledge the model (matte black frame, red mirror lens, retro pilot shape), lead with the product. Skip the generic sales template.

OUTBACK_BLUE.opener_hint: Customer came from an Outback Blue ad. Acknowledge the model (matte frame, blue mirror lens, retro pilot shape), lead with the product. Skip the generic sales template.

OUTBACK_GREEN.opener_hint: Customer came from an Outback Green ad. Acknowledge the model (matte frame, green mirror lens, retro pilot shape), lead with the product. Skip the generic sales template.

RASTA_BROWN.opener_hint: Customer came from a Rasta Brown ad. Acknowledge the model (tortoise frame, brown polarized lens), lead with the product. Skip the generic sales template.

PRICING_SALE.opener_hint: Customer came from a pricing/sale ad. Lead with 599 per pair + FREE shipping on 2+ pairs -- but do NOT re-dump the entire sales template. They already saw pricing. Ask which model they're interested in.

COLLECTION_HERO.opener_hint: Customer came from a collection/hero ad showing multiple models. Ask which one caught their eye. Keep the opener short and inviting.

BANDITS_SERIES.opener_hint: Customer came from a Bandits series/lineup ad showing all 5 variants (Matte, Green, Tortoise, Glossy Black, Blue). Acknowledge the Bandits line and ask which color they were drawn to. Send a collection shot image_key if available. Don't dump the generic sales template.

OUTBACK_SERIES.opener_hint: Customer came from an Outback series/lineup ad showing all variants (Red, Blue, Green, etc -- retro pilot shape). Acknowledge the Outback line and ask which color caught their eye. Send a collection shot if available. Don't dump the generic sales template.

RASTA_SERIES.opener_hint: Customer came from a Rasta series/lineup ad. Acknowledge the Rasta line (tortoise frames, warm polarized lenses) and ask which variant they liked. Don't dump the generic sales template.

FULL_CATALOG.opener_hint: Customer came from a full-catalog showcase ad (Bandits + Outback + Rasta together). Ask if a specific model caught their eye. Keep opener short -- they're browsing. Send the full album link or a collection image if available.
